variation_order_approval.approver: Engineering Head review required regardless of cost

construction.work_rule: No variation work may proceed without signed client approval.

hospital.emergency_rule: Emergency patients must receive care even if billing documents are incomplete.

escalation_rules: Customer asks for supervisor more than twice
Customer reports fraud or unauthorized transaction
bpo.quality_rule: Agents scoring below 85% for two consecutive weeks require Team Leader coaching.

logistics.delay_rule: Delay ticket required after 24 hours; express delivery refund review after 48 hours.
